description.default: Experience exceptional dining with carefully crafted dishes and impeccable service.
description.9514e017-a4b3-4af4-b742-254855257748: The MAKHZEN of the Tunis palaces (ancestor of our 'stores') once housed provisions. Its spectacular vaulted architecture, highlighted by shafts of light, resembles the 'knights' halls' of the High Middle Ages. It was naturally destined to house the hotel's main restaurant. It offers our refined clientele the specialties of Tunisian gastronomy and the original creations of our Chef, prepared with high-quality local products, certified organic whenever possible.
description.b75d528b-2ef7-4d23-aabb-44ae5de32099: Inspired by one of the great tea houses of Paris, the MAISON DE THÉ 'SURYA' offers in the afternoon and evening, upon reservation, a selection of single-origin teas — China, India, Japan, or Ceylon — accompanied by pastries from our chefs. Overlooking a quiet indoor garden, it is the ideal place for an English-style tea party or, simply, to pause time while savoring a cup of noble tea with a timeless aroma, in an exceptional setting. Coffee lovers' wishes are also fully catered for. The hotel is non-smoking but, during the summer season, a terrace is set up for the pleasure of traditional water pipe (Hookah, Shisha, Qelian...) with all varieties of cured tobacco, accompanied by Tunisian mint tea with pine nuts or Turkish coffee with orange blossom.

name.1b827e3c-bdf8-477f-9043-8ae8572136eb: Souk El Attarine: Perfumes & Local Crafts
name.3dddc826-9507-4aa4-842d-200985129331: Souk El Berka: Gold & Fine Jewelry
name.6ac82cb4-9eb7-46dc-88c6-9246dce8a19f: Avenue Habib Bourguiba: High-Street Shopping & Cafes

description.1b827e3c-bdf8-477f-9043-8ae8572136eb: Just a short walk away near the Zitouna Mosque. This is the place to find authentic essential oils, traditional perfumes, and premium Tunisian orange blossom or rose waters.
description.3dddc826-9507-4aa4-842d-200985129331: The historical gold market. It features beautiful architecture and is the absolute go-to spot for fine gold and silver jewelry.
description.6ac82cb4-9eb7-46dc-88c6-9246dce8a19f: Located in downtown Tunis (a 15-minute walk or 5-minute drive). It features high-street shopping, cafes, and smaller retail galleries like The Claridge.

heroSubtitle.f68672da-d6e4-46fd-95a5-753594a39a74: A small luxury hotel in a jewel of 18th century architecture

welcomeDescription.f68672da-d6e4-46fd-95a5-753594a39a74: Once the 18th-century residence of the Grand Mufti of the Regency of Tunis, this exceptional palace is perfectly located in the oldest heart of the historic Medina. Meticulously restored to its original splendor, the property preserves its authentic period woodwork, marbles, and historical tiles without a single modern addition.

welcomeDescriptionExtended.f68672da-d6e4-46fd-95a5-753594a39a74: Most remarkably, the palace houses a world-rare collection of authentic Iznik faience tiles, standing as one of the most magnificent artistic treasures of Tunis's cultural heritage.

mission.f68672da-d6e4-46fd-95a5-753594a39a74: Reviving the historic grandeur of the Medina through an exceptional hospitality experience, blending fine dining, traditional wellness, and refined hospitality.

towels.name: Towels
towels.description: A set of clean, soft, and absorbent bath and hand towels, replenished daily for guest comfort.

shampoo.name: Shampoo
shampoo.description: A cleansing hair wash provided for guests to refresh and clean their hair, leaving it soft and manageable.

hairdryer.name: Hair Dryer
hairdryer.description: A standard hair dryer is provided in the bathroom for guests' convenience.

coffeepods.name: Coffee Pods
coffeepods.description: Pre-measured, single-serving coffee pods for a quick and convenient hot beverage, ensuring a fresh cup of coffee at any time.

bedsheets.name: Bed Sheets
bedsheets.description: A complete set of clean and ironed bed linens (fitted sheet, flat sheet, pillowcases), available in various sizes to fit single, double, queen, or king beds, ensuring fresh and comfortable bedding for every stay.

hangers.name: Hangers
hangers.description: Durable hangers provided for organizing guests' clothes in the wardrobe, ensuring a neat and tidy stay.

additionaldoorlock.name: Additional Door Lock
additionaldoorlock.description: An extra security mechanism for the room door, to be engaged by the guest from inside for enhanced personal safety and privacy.

emergencyphonecharger.name: Emergency Phone Charger
emergencyphonecharger.description: A portable charger available for guests whose mobile phone battery is low, ensuring they can stay connected in emergencies.

replacementroomkey.name: Replacement Room Key
replacementroomkey.description: Issued to guests who have lost or forgotten their room key/card, ensuring secure and immediate access to their room.

faultypowersocketnotworking.name: Faulty power socket / Not working.
faultypowersocketnotworking.description: The power socket next to the bed is not working / there's no electricity.

splitsystem.name: Split System
splitsystem.description: A wall-mounted, reversible split-system air conditioner, 12000 BTU, complete with remote control, ensuring optimal room temperature.

showertapwithouthotwater.name: Shower / Tap without hot water.
showertapwithouthotwater.description: There is no hot water in the shower / at the sink tap.

waterleakinthebathroom.name: Water leak in the bathroom.
waterleakinthebathroom.description: There is a water leak under the sink / near the shower.

internetconnectionissue.name: Internet Connection Issue
internetconnectionissue.description: The Wi-Fi isn’t working in my room / I can’t connect to the Internet.

televisionremotecontrolfaulty.name: Television / Remote control faulty
televisionremotecontrolfaulty.description: Television out of order, HDMI cable issue, worn-out remote control batteries, or faulty IPTV system.

thephoneintheroomisnotworking.name: The phone in the room is not working
thephoneintheroomisnotworking.description: Telephone line issue (IP or analog), handset malfunction, or problem with the hotel’s telephone exchange.
